step_rationale: Collagen-binding proteoglycan stabilizing fibrous-cap ECM; aortic dissection biomarker reflects structural remodeling.
mechanism: Lumican cross-links collagen fibrils in the fibrous cap, reinforcing structural integrity against rupture.

references.title: Proteomic analysis of the extracellular matrix of human atherosclerotic plaques shows marked changes between plaque types.
Translatome profiling reveals Itih4 as a novel smooth muscle cell-specific gene in atherosclerosis.
Study on Proteomics-Based Aortic Dissection Molecular Markers Using iTRAQ Combined With Label Free Techniques.
Network-Based Identification and Prioritization of Key Regulators of Coronary Artery Disease Loci.
